title: Faster Boats
description: Your boat is too slow? This mod adds an enchantment to boats to make them faster.
body:
# Faster Boats

If you ever travelled quite a distance using a boat, you may have noticed they're really slow. 
This mod adds an enchantment to make them faster.

The Wave Rider enchantment can be obtained through villagers.

This mod requires the [fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) to function properly
